hooks.text: You fight your supplier over fifty dollars on every order. Then you hand your bank ten thousand dollars a year without a word.
You spent half a million dollars sourcing this year. There's one number on every wire that quietly decided where ten thousand of it went.
Half a million dollars in sourcing. Ten thousand gone. Zero fee lines, zero notifications. It was hiding inside the exchange rate the whole time.
A business owner never checked the rate on a single wire all year. Then he ran the year-end math and found ten thousand dollars missing.
This year your bank kept ten thousand dollars of your money. It came out of every supplier wire, hidden in the rate, never on a bill.
